keyTerms.Domesday Book: William the Conqueror's 1086 survey of every acre, animal, and asset in England — a landmark of administrative record-keeping
keyTerms.Norman Conquest: The 1066 invasion that replaced the Saxon ruling class with French-speaking Normans, pivoting England toward continental Europe
keyTerms.palimpsest: A manuscript page written and rewritten without fully erasing earlier text — the central metaphor for British history
keyTerms.Brexit: The United Kingdom's 2016 referendum vote to leave the European Union, reopening unresolved questions of national identity
keyTerms.constitutional monarchy: The British system in which the monarch's power is limited by law, established through civil war and the Glorious Revolution
